name: airdata_grafana
description: Descarga datos exportables de paneles de Grafana por ventanas temporales.

scripts.explore: pnpm run build && PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.ms-playwright node dist/scripts/explorar-grafana.js
scripts.download: pnpm run build && PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.ms-playwright node dist/scripts/descargar-grafana.js
scripts.download:job: pnpm run build && PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.ms-playwright node dist/scripts/descargar-job.js
scripts.api: pnpm run build && PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.ms-playwright node dist/scripts/api.js
